author: Jeremy Hou
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Instantly turns messy AI output into clean Obsidian notes on paste. Removes excessive blank lines, fixes code blocks, headers, removes emojis, and more.

manifest.author: Jeremy Hou
manifest.description: Instantly turns messy text pasted from AI chatbots like ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini into clean Markdown notes. Removes excessive blank lines and emojis, fixes code blocks, headers, and more.
manifest.name: Clean AI Paste

name: Clean AI Paste

releases.author: GoSlowPoke168
releases.description:
### v1.0.2 - Added Hyperlink Clean Formatting

#### New Features:
- Unbolds pasted hyperlinks
- Removes LLM tracking parameters like `?utm_source=chatgpt.com`

#### Other:
- Refactored code to make it more modular
releases.name: v1.0.2

releases.author: GoSlowPoke168
releases.description:
### v1.0.1 - Formatting Fixes & Stability

#### Bug Fixes:
- Fixed `Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + V` to paste without formatting, where the Obsidian keybind was overriding the program.
- Table formatting issues.
- LaTeX formatting issues.
releases.name: v1.0.1

releases.author: GoSlowPoke168
releases.description:
### Initial Release v1.0.0

This is the first release of **Clean AI Paste**. 

#### Features:
- **Blank Line Removal:** Automatically condenses multiple empty lines from AI outputs.
- **Fixes Language Headers:** Automatically detects detached code language labels (e.g., a line reading "Python" floating above a code block) and properly integrates them into the Markdown backticks (```python).
- **Header Formatting:** Strips bolding from Markdown headers for a cleaner look.
- **Smart Bypass:** Use `Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + V` to paste without formatting.
releases.name: v1.0.0
